history.text: Portuguese navigators reached the Cape Verde islands.
Ribeira Grande on Santiago became one of the first permanent European settlements in the tropics.
The PAIGC was founded to campaign for independence in Cape Verde and Guinea-Bissau.
Cape Verde became independent from Portugal appears in Cabo Verde's historical record.
